# cmplx

```go
import "math/cmplx"
```

Package cmplx provides basic constants and mathematical functions for complex numbers. Special case handling conforms to the C99 standard Annex G IEC 60559\-compatible complex arithmetic.

## Index

- [func Abs\(x complex128\) float64](<#Abs>)

<a name="Abs"></a>

## func [Abs](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/abs.go#L13>)

```go
func Abs(x complex128) float64
```

Abs returns the absolute value \(also called the modulus\) of x.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"math/cmplx"
)

func main() {
	fmt.Printf("%.1f", cmplx.Abs(3+4i))
}
```

#### Output

```go
5.0
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="Acos"></a>

## func [Acos](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/asin.go#L133>)

```go
func Acos(x complex128) complex128
```

Acos returns the inverse cosine of x.

```go
func Acosh(x complex128) complex128
```

Acosh returns the inverse hyperbolic cosine of x.

<a name="Cot"></a>

## func [Cot](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/tan.go#L288>)

```go
func Cot(x complex128) complex128
```

<a name="Exp"></a>

## func [Exp](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/exp.go#L51>)

```go
func Exp(x complex128) complex128
```

Exp returns e\*\*x, the base\-e exponential of x.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

ExampleExp computes Euler's identity.

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"math"
	"math/cmplx"
)

func main() {
	fmt.Printf("%.1f", cmplx.Exp(1i*math.Pi)+1)
}
```

#### Output

```go
(0.0+0.0i)
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="Inf"></a>

## func [Inf](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/isinf.go#L18>)

```go
func Inf() complex128
```

Inf returns a complex infinity, complex\(\+Inf, \+Inf\).

<a name="IsInf"></a>

## func [IsInf](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/isinf.go#L10>)

```go
func IsInf(x complex128) bool
```

IsInf reports whether either real\(x\) or imag\(x\) is an infinity.

<a name="IsNaN"></a>

## func [IsNaN](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/isnan.go#L11>)

```go
func IsNaN(x complex128) bool
```

IsNaN reports whether either real\(x\) or imag\(x\) is NaN and neither is an infinity.

```go
func Log(x complex128) complex128
```

Log returns the natural logarithm of x.

```go
func Log10(x complex128) complex128
```

Log10 returns the decimal logarithm of x.

<a name="NaN"></a>

## func [NaN](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/isnan.go#L22>)

```go
func NaN() complex128
```

NaN returns a complex “not\-a\-number” value.

<a name="Phase"></a>

## func [Phase](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/phase.go#L11>)

```go
func Phase(x complex128) float64
```

Phase returns the phase \(also called the argument\) of x. The returned value is in the range \[\-Pi, Pi\].

<a name="Polar"></a>

## func [Polar](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/polar.go#L10>)

```go
func Polar(x complex128) (r, θ float64)
```

Polar returns the absolute value r and phase θ of x, such that x = r \* e\*\*θi. The phase is in the range \[\-Pi, Pi\].

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"math"
	"math/cmplx"
)

func main() {
	r, theta := cmplx.Polar(2i)
	fmt.Printf("r: %.1f, θ: %.1f*π", r, theta/math.Pi)
}
```

#### Output

```go
r: 2.0, θ: 0.5*π
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="Pow"></a>

## func [Pow](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/pow.go#L50>)

```go
func Pow(x, y complex128) complex128
```

Pow returns x\*\*y, the base\-x exponential of y. For generalized compatibility with [math.Pow](<https://pkg.go.dev/math/#Pow>):

```go
Pow(0, ±0) returns 1+0i
Pow(0, c) for real(c)<0 returns Inf+0i if imag(c) is zero, otherwise Inf+Inf i.
```

<a name="Rect"></a>

## func [Rect](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/rect.go#L10>)

```go
func Rect(r, θ float64) complex128
```

Rect returns the complex number x with polar coordinates r, θ.

<a name="Sin"></a>

## func [Sin](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/sin.go#L53>)

```go
func Sin(x complex128) complex128
```

Sin returns the sine of x.

<a name="Sinh"></a>

## func [Sinh](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/sin.go#L86>)

```go
func Sinh(x complex128) complex128
```

Sinh returns the hyperbolic sine of x.

<a name="Sqrt"></a>

## func [Sqrt](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/sqrt.go#L58>)

```go
func Sqrt(x complex128) complex128
```

Sqrt returns the square root of x. The result r is chosen so that real\(r\) ≥ 0 and imag\(r\) has the same sign as imag\(x\).

<a name="Tan"></a>

## func [Tan](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/tan.go#L62>)

```go
func Tan(x complex128) complex128
```

Tan returns the tangent of x.

## func [Tanh](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/math/cmplx/tan.go#L96>)

```go
func Tanh(x complex128) complex128
```

Tanh returns the hyperbolic tangent of x.
